title: Applications of AI in Space Domain
author: Brasil Rebelo dos Santos, Luciana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A data extraction worksheet was created to gather all relevant data from the identified studies and manage the selection process in this systematic literature review. The main information presented in this worksheet summarizes the followed protocol, containing an identifier (id) for each returned study, bibliographic reference, and data to answers to research questions. This catalog helped us in the data extraction and synthesis procedures and may be used by potentially interested, for example, for updating or replication.
